subject: Kernel Lane E2E Summary - PASS-WARN
body: Kernel lane E2E test results: recovery suite 10/11 pass (multi_source_consistency fail due to SwarmMind missing identity, pre-existing). collision-check and test-phase4-gates scripts not found on this lane. Post-compact audit: conflicted (trust store key drift, pre-existing). Identity enforcer: 4/4 lanes present. Sync gate: 1 lane out of sync (archivist PEM fingerprint mismatch). Outbox guard: 4 unsigned legacy messages (pre-date new GAP-009/011 requirements). GAP-002, GAP-006, GAP-009, GAP-011 all patched this session.
